a:T5dec,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline the cell theory.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State <strong>two</strong> functions of life.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>List <strong>three</strong> characteristics of eukaryotic homologous chromosomes.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Using the following table, compare and contrast anaerobic cell respiration in yeasts and in humans. The first row has been completed as an example.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>b:T5641,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. cells can only arise from preexisting cells ✔</p>
<p>b. living organisms are composed of cells/smallest unit of life ✔</p>
<p>c. organisms consisting of only one cell carry out all functions of life in that cell/cells perform life functions «at some point in their existence» ✔</p>
<p>d. although most organisms conform to cell theory, there are exceptions ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. nutrition ✔</p>
<p>b. metabolism/respiration ✔</p>
<p>c. growth ✔</p>
<p>d. response/irritability ✔</p>
<p>e. excretion ✔</p>
<p>f. homeostasis ✔</p>
<p>g. reproduction ✔</p>
<p><em>Do not allow “feeding”, plants do not “feed”</em>.</p>
<p><em>Mark the first two answers only</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. linear DNA molecules<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>DNA associated with histone «proteins» ✔</p>
<p>b. carry the same sequence of <span style="text-decoration: underline;">genes</span> ✔</p>
<p>c. «but» not necessarily the same <span style="text-decoration: underline;">alleles</span> «of those genes» ✔</p>
<p>d. both are present when nucleus is in diploid state ✔<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>occur in pairs ✔</p>
<p>e. have <span style="text-decoration: underline;">same</span> size/length/banding patterns ✔</p>
<p>f. centromeres are in the same position ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p><em>Award <strong>[1]</strong> per correct row</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/3/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","3"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19N.2.SL.TZ0.3"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","2"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","1-1-introduction-to-cells, 3-2-chromosomes, 2-8-cell-respiration"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">d.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
